Sütőtál ORION Sütőedény fedővel, 39,5 × 24,5 cm, boroszilikát üveg/UH:

Součástí je plastové víko, které usnadňuje skladování hotového jídla v lednici nebo jeho přenášení. items.raw_desc: Fazék Savanyító edény zöldségekhez 1,3 l PICKLES:        If you love pickled vegetables, prepare this popular delicacy yourself, from your own sources and in the right proportions and flavour for you. Chop suitable vegetables and add them together with spices or herbs to the prepared Orion PICKLES pot. Then cover the contents with the inner lid, close the pot with the outer lid and place a wooden skewer in the centre hole. Secure the attached rubber band behind the ears and then pull it over the shank. This will constantly put pressure on the inner lid and the vegetables inside. Thanks to the natural process of lactic fermentation, you will have a healthy snack or side dish ready within a few days. The 1.3 l PICKLES Orion vegetable pickling pot is made of ceramic and is dishwasher safe.
